content:
Hello again, this is rain from Morimen discord. The last post i made was on the Goliath aequor story speedrun comp a while ago.

With the release of new unit mouchette and thais rerun(again), we now have a even faster speed run comp!

To start, why use mouch:

Shes is given for free to all players as part of the collab event (clear chapter 1, get from event page)

Her base damage is really REALLY high, which make her early game clear super duper fast

With some investment (E3,Lv60) , she can clear Dtide W1A5/W3A5 with cheap supports (helot, faint/lily etc, no thais needed)

shes just a fun unit in general


Update:  you can skip to the next part for the latest guide if you missed the thais lily banner, because it has rotated out, you can't pull them atm. I'm also using ramona over thais as an example for those that didn't manage to pull thais. REFER TO THE END OF THE THREAD FOR MY HARD MODE CLEAR OF CHAPTER 7.


----------------To Skip----------------

Unit break point and wheels:

The only 2 SSR wheel you need for this are Lily's Signature and Thais‘s signature.

Lily Signature(syringe looking wheel below) -> you use it because its a DR wheel (scaling from mouch E1) and because it gives free crit rate/crit damage on [strike] cards—— which all of mouch's offence cards are considered [strike].

Thais Signature(Goat/womb looking wheel below) -> Top 3 Wheel in game, no reason not to pull for it, just do it.

-----------------end of skip----------------

Now that lily wheel is not so available,  your best bet is either mouchette's signature or Blade of Titan. In general,  i would say use blade if you have it E3 or more dupes, it's gonna be more damage, other wise her own wheel at e0 is an ok options too.

For SR choice, you can use analysis of death / to dearest friend to boost her crit rate even more. I have used the combination of these two SR wheels in my hard mode clear at the end of thread.

Now onto units:(with latest update)


Helot (the right most unit)-> Current best [strike] support, no enlighten needed. Her main ultility is to draw + strike buff from her exalt and generate more strike via her 1 cost skill to enable mouch follow up. SELL HER 4 COST AT THE FIRST CHANCE YOU GET, ITS USELESS IN THIS COMP


Mouchette -> Star of the show, high base damage, fast story clear, works for story at E0, works in the late game at E3 as your W1/W3 warrior. Her critical stop point is E2 (base copy + 2 dupes), this is the enlighten where she will get back a strike card you last played when using mortal blow and give it reduce 1 cost, very useful for her combo. E3 is more damage, which is always nice, but not the most important.

Aigis ->Also no enlighten needed(You can get her dupes from shop thou). Free unit given at end of chapter 1, the best vulnerability bot in game, also generate some decent Skey. Her exalt is very powerful(a stun), especially for a squishy team like this.

Ramona-> free support unit given at the start of the game, her cards themselves are not that amazing, however she has a very powerful exalt (able to fetch any card and make it 0 cost)+ her rouse making her able to use strike for no cost (when glowing) is very helpful to build up mouchette passive. She also generate some decent keyflare on her own without any investment.


Potential upgrades

Thais: if you were here before she rotated out, you can refer to the old guide and user her over ramona, S tier support, using her exalt to dupe card is very powerful.

Posse choice: 
Now her posse is available from event story,  use that.
If you don't have it yet, easiest to get posse for this team (and arguably one of the best ) is the mouse posse you get from chapter 1. This is because mouch's needs to play as many strike card as possible -> needs alot of arith.

How to play:

1. Get the rouse card for mouch ASAP

2. Sell Helot 4 cost ASAP(sell ramona 3 cost as well if you are using her, followed by aigis def)

Your first fight of each stage is usually the hardest,  because you won't have your exalt. Just try to survive 1 or 2 turn—proc a Death Resistance if you must, until you get your setup ready. From there , you can carry on the stage:

For mob waves -> Exalt mouch -> play her cards

For elite -> Rouse mouch -> Exalt mouch -> dupe card with thais(fetch card after playing it with ramona instead) -> play her cards
Rmb you can always aigis exalt with devour to get in a stun at the start to buy time for setup.

Boss fight burst combo:

Helot devour exalt(to draw 3 and buff strike) -> Mouch exalt -> thais exalt to dupe(ramona to fetch) mouch's 3 cost(or 1 cost) -> play all the cards that are treated as [strike] in hand -> profit (play mouchette cards last if possible. Due to how her rouse scales)




RMB YOU HAVE A FREE HEAL BUTTON NEXT TO YOUR HEALTH BAR AS CARO REALM<:takenotes:1357186646294138890> 

Other Wheel choice:

Im sure everyone knows R wheels are broken in arc 1 now, so i think i dont need too much explanation here, put those R wheels on your supports and go ham.  I MUST EMPHASIS THIS, R WHEELS （The brown color ones) ARE VERY POWERFUL IN ARC 1, USE THEM ON YOUR SUPPORT OVER SSR WHEELS. 



Additional gameplay advice:

Relic & Orison.

In general,  this comp can roll through most content, so for normal stages just look for relics&orison that give you arith/str and damage, curse relics are usually very good at this (which is why you take frenzy wheel)

However, for boss stages, you may consider taking some defensive relic such as the healing cup and the free revive doll i took in my clear below. (Gluttony wheel help a ton because of the max hp it gives)

Note that if you are playing the ramona version, you won't have any weakness in the team. So it's adviced to get a weakness orison.
